result.status_detail: Block warning rendered with 차단; matches W5.1/W5.0 baseline (m365→emit_ws_envelope refactor inert for non-copilot/non-m365 WS services)

notes: GUI method. Opened perplexity.ai in new tab, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), closed Google sign-in popup, typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into search input, clicked submit (제출), waited ~65s. Answer area renders the security-policy block message containing expected text 차단: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' (verified via UIAutomation text extraction, MATCH_CHADAN_FOUND). Secondary '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다 / 다시 시도' post-block stream-disconnect notice also present, identical to baseline #1307. W5.2 regression: m365_signalr migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope (DB row id=87 ws_signalr); perplexity (non-copilot/non-m365 WS) outcome IDENTICAL to W5.1/W5.0/W4+W6 baseline — refactor did not affect this service. No new regression.
